files.welcome:
---
tags:
  - munix
status: draft
---

# Welcome to Munix

Munix is a local-first note app for editing Markdown files with a block-based editor.

## Try this first

- Open notes from the file tree
- Rename this title to rename the file
- Type `---` then Enter to create a properties panel
- Search for tags like `#munix`

> This sample vault was created under your Documents folder.
files.markdown:
# Markdown basics

## Checklist

- [ ] Create a link: [Munix roadmap](../Projects/Munix%20roadmap.md)
- [ ] Add a tag: #guide
- [ ] Write a code block

```ts
const app = "Munix";
```

## Table

| Feature | Status |
| --- | --- |
| File tree | Ready |
| Properties | Ready |
| Search | Ready |
